scenario: Redmine work session - audit the Issue contract before a teardown rework

specificity.rationale: Only two concrete file:line references appear (issue.rb:1 and application_record.rb:19); the answer names Attachment, Watcher, Journal, and three mixin class names without any paths, and CustomValue is missing entirely — far short of the app/models/attachment.rb, watcher.rb, custom_value.rb, lib/plugins/ specificity the rubric requires.

justification.rationale: The answer lists 'shared behaviors via acts_as_* mixins' but never explains WHY the architecture factors them this way — that a single shared mixin and polymorphic collaborator record is reused so every participating model inherits the same attachment/watcher/custom-value behavior without duplicating it.

uncertainty.rationale: No uncertainty is flagged anywhere despite CustomValue being wholly absent and all mixin file locations being unlocated; an agent acting on this answer would not know to verify those gaps before proceeding.

relationship.rationale: The phrase 'polymorphic associations for … attachments (Attachment), watchers (Watcher)' gestures at the mechanism but states no connecting path — no mixin name, no has_many … as: :container/:watchable, no polymorphic association name — and CustomValue's relationship is entirely omitted, leaving the agent without the mixin → polymorphic-association → collaborator-record chain.
